transcript.text: Hello, here's a video I think I should share, and it's that you should be very careful with Q-tips.
I injured myself with my Q-tips.
I put the Q-tip in my ear last month, because I felt like I had a problem with earwax buildup or something,
Because all of a sudden I couldn't hear out of this ear, so then I was in there digging.
And then I started digging in this ear, and then all of a sudden this ear was like, I feel all this pressure,
And I can feel my voice echoing inside my head for the last month or something.
And I think I punctured my eardrum or something, because I was doing this and this, and then it hurt,
And now my ear hurts, and I can barely hear out of it.
Like when I do this, I can't hear.
And this ear is better, but even this ear feels a little bit pressurized.
And I think doctors have said, yeah, you don't want to stick anything in here, not even Q-tips.
So be very, very, very, very careful with Q-tips, man.
I hope I get my hearing back.
The FDA outlawed these little cones, because I did buy the earwax removal, these drops.
And I poured that in, but I don't know how those can get the earwax out,
Because you're just putting more crap in your ears.
There are these cones that we used to buy, where there's these big wax cones,
And then you set a fire on the end of it, and you put them in your ear,
And then you hear the crackling, and then you open it up after like 10 minutes of that,
After it burns down to like this long.
And you open it up, and there's a fucking insane amount of earwax in there,
Like so much, piles of it.
I wanted to get some of those, but my mom said they outlawed them,
But I don't know why they would do that.
They shouldn't outlaw them, because that's a way to get a wax out of your,
Without having to put anything in your ear.
Because it's really, really, really delicate machinery in there, dude,
And you could fuck yourself up if you stick these in.
Don't stick these in. Get that earwax stuff, and there you go.
So I don't know why the FDA outlawed those.
It's ridiculous, because how could they possibly hurt?
They're saving you.
Yeah, dude, so be careful, dude.
Once I use up all my Schwabs, I'm not going to buy ear wax or ear q-tips anymore,
So yeah, be careful.
